description: Multi-turn: create dashboard -> update name (covers `neomind dashboard update`; previously uncovered).

turns.user: Create a dashboard named Draft Board.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind dashboard create --name 'Draft Board'`, parses id
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind dashboard update <id> --name 'Published Board'` (or PUT /api/dashboards/<id>)
expectations.overall: Turn 2 must reuse the id from Turn 1
